channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘We killed dogs’: Israeli troops kill two children, parents in West Bank
item.description: Each person shot in the head in the village of Tammun, while two other children of the deceased couple sustain injuries.

item.title: Iranian govt reveals scale of civilian casualties from US-Israeli strikes
item.description: Govt spokesperson Fatemeh Mohajerani says US-Israeli strikes have damaged more than 42,000 civilian sites across Iran.

item.title: Iran claims US and Israel using copycat ‘Lucas’ drones to frame it
item.description: Iran claims US and Israel using copycat 'Lucas' drones to frame it for regional attacks.

item.title: Thousands in Paris protest military actions in Iran, Lebanon and Palestine
item.description: Thousands in Paris protest military operations in the Middle East. One of more than 85 protests across France.

item.title: Trump says US may hit Iran’s Kharg Island again ‘just for fun’
item.description: US president says his country may carry out more strikes on oil hub as he urges allies to help open Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 16 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Israel and US attacks on Isfahan kills 15 people as Tehran carries out retaliatory attacks on Israel and Gulf countries.

item.title: MotoGP postpones Qatar Grand Prix due to Middle East conflict
item.description: The Qatar GP, scheduled for April 10-12, has been rescheduled for November amid the ongoing US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Activists rally outside White House against war with Iran
item.description: Activists rally outside White House against war with Iran

item.title: Al-Quds Day rally in Toronto calls for an end to the war in Iran & Lebanon
item.description: Demonstrators gathered in Toronto for Al-Quds Day, denouncing US-Israeli attacks on Iran and Lebanon.

item.title: Minab: When the world’s most precise missile chose a classroom
item.description: Targeting a school and the mass killing of children are war crimes, and those responsible need to be held to account.
